creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
On 2010-06-25T06:29:21+0000, makc@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Maintainer-update: lang/s9ges
> [...]
> Fails to build on tinderbox:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/tb/s9fes-20100621.log. Could you look at
> it?

Fixed, thanks! New patches below.

diff -ru lang/s9fes-old/Makefile lang/s9fes/Makefile
--- lang/s9fes-old/Makefile	2010-05-29 14:54:01.000000000 +0200
+++ lang/s9fes/Makefile	2010-06-25 12:21:33.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	s9fes
-PORTVERSION=	20100524
+PORTVERSION=	20100625
 CATEGORIES=	lang scheme
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.t3x.org/misc/
 
diff -ru lang/s9fes-old/distinfo lang/s9fes/distinfo
--- lang/s9fes-old/distinfo	2010-05-29 14:54:01.000000000 +0200
+++ lang/s9fes/distinfo	2010-06-25 12:21:33.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SIZE (s9fes-20100524.tar.gz) = 257723
+MD5 (s9fes-20100625.tar.gz) = e3fcc3e640beed0668e7490e8b663715

+SIZE (s9fes-20100625.tar.gz) = 321602
